title: Go MCP servers: benchmarks & scaling traps
meta_description: Cut MCP server latency 80% with Go: binary JSON, atomic tool registry, and fixed-size pools. Benchmarks, traps, and the 30-minute fix.
prewritten_tweet:
Teams building Go MCP servers hit 110ms p95 at 1k connections.

After swapping JSON for CBOR, pooling goroutines, and atomic tool registry, it’s 22ms p95.

https://kubaik.github.io/go-mcp-servers-benchmarks-scaling-traps
